name: Stack
description: Vertical flex wrapper with gap prop.

api.name: Stack
api.description: Vertical flex wrapper with gap prop.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.description: Flex layout axis — Vertical (flex-col, default) or Horizontal (flex-row).

parameters.name: Gap
parameters.description: Tailwind spacing scale value rendered as gap-{Gap} (e.g. "2", "4"). No gap class is emitted when null.

parameters.name: Align
parameters.description: Cross-axis alignment keyword rendered as items-{Align} (e.g. "center", "start").

parameters.name: Justify
parameters.description: Main-axis distribution keyword rendered as justify-{Justify} (e.g. "between", "center").

parameters.name: Wrap
parameters.description: Allows children to wrap onto multiple lines (flex-wrap). Default false.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div.

examples.title: Gap Sizes
examples.code:
<Stack Direction="Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal" Gap="1">...</Stack>
<Stack Direction="Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal" Gap="4">...</Stack>
<Stack Direction="Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal" Gap="8">...</Stack>

mdSummary:
# Stack

Vertical flex wrapper with gap prop.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/stack

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Stack | Direction | `Lumeo.Orientation` | `Lumeo.Orientation.Vertical` | Flex layout axis — Vertical (flex-col, default) or Horizontal (flex-row). |
| Stack | Gap | `string?` | `` | Tailwind spacing scale value rendered as gap-{Gap} (e.g. "2", "4"). No gap class is emitted when null. |
| Stack | Align | `string?` | `` | Cross-axis alignment keyword rendered as items-{Align} (e.g. "center", "start"). |
| Stack | Justify | `string?` | `` | Main-axis distribution keyword rendered as justify-{Justify} (e.g. "between", "center"). |
| Stack | Wrap | `bool` | `false` | Allows children to wrap onto multiple lines (flex-wrap). Default false. |
| Stack | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The stacked children. |
| Stack | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div. |
| Stack | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary\<string, object\>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root div. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Stack) — The stacked children.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Stack />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Stack/Stack.razor`
